proposal_summary: This proposal initiates a transfer of 1,218,669.76 USDC from the ENS DAO treasury to ENS Labs to reimburse them for legal fees incurred during the eth.link litigation.

claimed_actions.raw_action: initiate a transfer of 1,218,669.76 USDC from the ENS DAO treasury to ENS Labs
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Reimbursement of 1,218,669.76 USDC to ENS Labs for legal fees
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: This executable proposal will initiate a transfer of 1,218,669.76 USDC from the ENS DAO treasury to ENS Labs. This amount represents the final total of all legal expenses related to the eth.link litigation.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal consists of a single ERC20 transfer of USDC.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: This transaction calls the `transfer` function of the USDC contract, transferring 1,218,669.76 USDC to ENS Labs' address.

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: This transaction calls the `transfer` function of the USDC contract
